VALUES:
Dear Parents,

  • On 11th Sep, 2018, there will be Parents Teacher Meeting (PTM) for classes Nur to IX from 08:00 am to 10:00 am.

 

  • Summer Vacations for students of classes Nur to IX will be from 12th Sep, 2018 to 2nd Oct, 2018. School will be re-open on3rd Oct, 2018 for students.

 

  • Regular classes will be conducted for students of X and XII on 11th Sep, 2018 (PTM Day) from 7:30 am to 1:20 pm and from 14th Sep, 2018 onwards classes will be from 7:30 am to 11:30 am.

Dear Parents,

Security & Safety of your ward is our prime concern and therefore, school is making all out sincere effort to ensure security & safety of your ward in the school and in school buses.

Since your ward is using Pvt. Owned/hired vehicles for the school to & from, therefore Govt. has issued some important guidelines in this regard. Accordingly our school has issued an advisory on 13.09.2018 (copy available on school website).

This time also Transport Deptt, Govt. of Delhi has issued directions for the Parents too to ensure that your ward is not using unsafe & illegal Cab/Vans.

Once again, you are requested to check and ensure that all the mandatory conditions are being followed by the Pvt. Owned/hired Cab/Vans. (Copy of directions are again attached herewith).

Kindly co-operate and help for the safety of your ward.
